source_audit.bronze_reconciliation: 9/9 source tables matched audited raw counts
warnings: Informational: geolocation has 981148 duplicate zip-code rows; this is not a Bronze ingestion failure.
Optional lookup warning: 13 product rows across 2 distinct product_category_name values have no English translation.

metric_definitions.Item Merchandise Value (excludes freight: Sum of order item price values; freight is excluded.
metric_definitions.Average Item Merchandise Value per Order: Item Merchandise Value excluding freight divided by distinct orders.
metric_definitions.Seller-Attributed Order Value (item + fr: Seller-level item price plus seller-level freight value.
metric_definitions.Orders by Primary Payment Type: One deterministic payment type per order, selected by highest payment value, then lowest payment sequence, then payment type alphabetically.
metric_definitions.Late-delivery rate: Late-delivery rate = delivered orders received after the estimated delivery date divided by all delivered orders with valid actual and estimated delivery dates.

source_characteristics.geolocation_note: Geolocation contains repeated zip-code observations and is not used in the current business marts.

methodology_notes: Reviews Bronze ingestion uses multiline-safe CSV parsing.
13 product rows across 2 categories are retained using untranslated__ fallback labels.
Demand features predict target_units for forecast_month using only information available before that month starts.
Churn classification is not trained because snapshot inactivity is 99.25%.
